blended.narrative: Stoneham is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 18 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,924 ft. Looking ahead, 34 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
